descriptionKey.english: Fleshlings have [effect0.power][attack] and [effect1.power][health] and gain [spikes] [effect3.power]. Fleshweaver has [effect4.power] more stacks of [mass].
descriptionKey.french: Les Lambeaux gagnent [effect0.power][attack], [effect1.power][health] et [spikes] [effect3.power]. Le Tisseur de chair gagne <nobr>[effect4.power] cumuls</nobr> de [mass] en plus.
descriptionKey.german: Fleischlinge verfügen über [effect0.power][attack] und [effect1.power][health] und erhalten [spikes] [effect3.power]. Fleischweber hat [effect4.power] zusätzliche Stapel [mass].
descriptionKey.russian: Мяско получает [effect0.power][attack], [effect1.power][health] и [spikes] [effect3.power]. Мясконосу дополнительно дается [mass] х[effect4.power].
descriptionKey.portuguese: Os Cárneos têm [effect0.power][attack] e [effect1.power][health] e ganham [spikes] [effect3.power]. O Tecelão Cárneo tem mais [effect4.power] cargas de [mass].
descriptionKey.chinese: 血肉幼体拥有 [effect0.power][attack]，[effect1.power][health] 并获得 [spikes] [effect3.power]。血肉编织者的 [mass] 层数增加 [effect4.power]。
descriptionKey.spanish: Los Carnosos tienen [effect0.power][attack], [effect1.power][health] y añaden [spikes] [effect3.power]. El Tejecarnes tiene [effect4.power] acumulaciones más de [mass].
descriptionKey.chinese_traditional: 血肉造物擁有[effect0.power][attack]和[effect1.power][health]並獲得[spikes][effect3.power]。血肉編織者擁有[effect4.power]層額外的[mass]。
descriptionKey.korean: 플레시링들이 [effect0.power][attack], [effect1.power][health]을 지니며, [spikes] [effect3.power] 효과를 획득합니다. 플레시위버는 [mass]에 [effect4.power]스택이 더해집니다.
descriptionKey.japanese: 肉塊は[effect0.power][attack]と[effect1.power][health]のステータスを得る。さらに、[spikes] [effect3.power]を得る。肉縫いは[mass]のスタックが[effect4.power]増加する。
